typeProperties.command: .delete table PaymentAttemptSnapshot records <| PaymentAttemptSnapshot | where window_start >= startofday(ago(1d)) and window_start < startofday(now())

source.requestBody: {"query": "let start = startofday(ago(1d)); let end = startofday(now()); AppTraces | where TimeGenerated >= start and TimeGenerated < end | where Message has '[EMD][PAYMENT][GET-REDIRECT]' | where Message has 'New payment attempt for tpp' | extend tpp_id = extract('tpp:([^ ,]+)', 1, Message), origin_id = extract('originId:([^ ,]+)', 1, Message), notice_number = extract('noticeNumber:([^ ,]+)', 1, Message) | summarize first_time = min(TimeGenerated), attempt_count = count() by tpp_id, origin_id, notice_number | project window_start = tostring(bin(first_time, 1h)), tpp_id, origin_id, notice_number, attempt_count | order by window_start asc"}
